description: Functional Requirement Specification library derived from URS requirements.

functions.title: Cycle recipe management
functions.functionalRequirement: System provides controlled cycle recipes with approved setpoints.

functions.title: Alarm and interlock handling
functions.functionalRequirement: System shall detect out-of-limit conditions and enforce alarms/interlocks.

functions.title: Utility condition monitoring
functions.functionalRequirement: System shall verify required utility conditions before and during cycle execution.

functions.title: Electronic records and audit trail
functions.functionalRequirement: System shall maintain attributable, legible, contemporaneous, original, and accurate records with audit trail.

functions.title: Load throughput execution
functions.functionalRequirement: System shall process load schedule at selected throughput with no loss of control.
